notes:
### v1.3.6

#### Added
- Added the first local foundation for MeowGang Raid Management. Selected Discord IDs can access a new Raid Management area for drafting learning, reclear, and raid-night signup sheets.
- Raid Management supports fixed raid templates, custom raid trains, Discord timestamp previews, DPS/SUP/ANY spots, experienced helper markers, pre-registered members, request handoff, draft previews, and publishing through Meowtator.

#### Updated
- Updated raid gold values for the latest game changes across Echidna, Behemoth, Aegir, Brelshaza, Mordum, Armoche, Kazeros, and Serca.
- Prepared Horizon Cathedral/Cathedral reward data internally with Stage 1, Stage 2, and Stage 3 values. It stays hidden until encounter/boss mapping data is available.

#### Fixed
- MeowConnect temporary-player markers are more accurate. Temporary played-by labels now stay tied to the specific uploaded encounter instead of being reused on unrelated logs where the same borrowed character only appears as another party member.
- MeowConnect Logs handle duplicate clear sources more clearly. Manual completion-only snapshots are no longer treated like full LOA Logs encounter evidence when a matching shared encounter already exists, reducing duplicate rows and confusing source labels.

#### Technical Notes
- Added Raid Management frontend routing, access gating, sidebar visibility, and the initial management workspace.
- Added local Raid Management data models and Supabase service helpers for requests, signup sheets, signup raids, signup entries, publishing, updating, deleting entries, and loading shared event data.
- Added draft-only signup creation flow: new sheets must be saved as drafts first, while publishing happens from the draft preview section.
- Added ordered bulk publishing for multiple drafts by event start time.
- Added published-event editing so an ongoing/published event can be loaded back into the builder and updated without changing its event ID.
- Added request-to-signup handoff, local done/reopen request state, manager name mapping, and Load Data refresh behavior for Supabase-backed Raid Management data.
- Added Meowtator asset icons for raid roles/statuses and updated preview rendering to use bundled PNG/WebP assets.
- Updated Meowtator bot support in the private bot workspace for persisted signup sheets, Discord request intake, request decisions, published signup posting, message refresh, expired event cleanup, and server display-name storage for requesters.
- Added pending Cathedral raid definitions outside the active `RAIDS` export so current app raid settings and encounter sync do not expose incomplete raid data.
- Updated raid reward source data to reflect new tradable/bound gold splits while keeping box prices unchanged where existing values were already present.
- Adjusted MeowConnect log de-duplication so completion-only rows are suppressed when matching encounter-backed LOA Logs evidence exists, while preserving the distinction between manual snapshots and actual encounter snapshots.
